items.summary: In backend/main.mo, ensure the setMaintenanceMode(enabled: Bool) function has absolutely no authorization or identity check of any kind — no caller validation, no admin principal check, no 'Unauthorized' guard. The function must accept calls from any caller including anonymous, update the stable maintenanceMode variable, and return without error. Verify the stable variable holding the maintenance mode flag persists across canister upgrades and is never re-initialized to false on restart.

In frontend/src/components/admin/UsersControlsPanel.tsx, update the useSetMaintenanceMode mutation's onError handler to display only a user-friendly toast error message such as 'Failed to update maintenance mode. Please try again.' Never display raw IC rejection error strings, replica error bodies, Request IDs, reject codes, or HTTP details on screen.

In frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts, verify and fix the useSetMaintenanceMode mutation hook to correctly call the backend actor's setMaintenanceMode(enabled: Bool) method. Ensure the hook uses the actor from the useActor hook, wraps the call in a try/catch, and on error throws a user-readable error string rather than the raw IC rejection. Invalidate the 'maintenanceMode' query key on success so the toggle immediately reflects the new state.
